ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Unique part number for each product */,
  "product_type" INTEGER /* ID of the product type */,
  "gain" REAL /* Gain of the product in dBi */,
  "application" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "min_separation" TEXT /* Minimum separation requirement for the product */,
  "frequency_range" TEXT /* Frequency range of the product */,
  "polarization" TEXT /* Polarization of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "environmental_rating" TEXT /* Environmental rating of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_application FOREIGN KEY ("application") REFERENCES applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_type FOREIGN KEY ("product_type") REFERENCES product_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the product type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the product type */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "application_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry associated with the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in inventory */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in inventory */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the product is stored */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the product */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory level was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the warehouse */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse manager */,
  "manager_email" TEXT /* Email of the warehouse manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the document belongs to */,
  "document_type" INTEGER /* ID of the document type */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "revision" INTEGER /* Revision number of the document */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the document was published */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the document expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_documents_document_type FOREIGN KEY ("document_type") REFERENCES document_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_documents_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the document type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the document type */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the document type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update */,
  "affected_components" TEXT /* Components affected by the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_updates_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the role */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the product */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
